PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q11576 p:P54 ?membership .
  ?membership ps:P54 ?team ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) <= 2002 && YEAR(?end) >= 2002)
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?team) , "Q"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?teamLabel , "Club") || CONTAINS(?teamLabel , "Real Madrid"))
}
